title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 19th February 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Good company but results don't reflect the expectations; holders were told to hold at 2,400.
recommendations.detail: A couple of friends who had bought at 3,200 and were sitting on a big fall were told to hold at 2,400; the stock then moved 12% in a single day to nearly 2,900. It is a good company - an institution like L&T took a roughly 15-20% stake at 3,500 - except that the momentum is not seen anywhere in the results. He warned that anyone who bought the Nvidia-headline 20% upper circuit in a rush was caught, since E2E clarified to the exchanges it was the same existing relationship announced in the first week of January.

recommendations.note: Activity and volumes rising continuously; Google Maps takeover talk is only a rumour.
recommendations.detail: CE Info, that is MapmyIndia, is continuously seeing some activity and increasing volumes. In the undercurrent there is a rumour that Google Maps may take it over, but he stressed it can be true or may mostly remain only a rumour - "it's only a rumour, that's all, nothing more than that."

recommendations.note: NHAI debarred it for two years from bidding; something is not going well with this company.
recommendations.detail: National Highways has banned NCC for up to two years from bidding for new projects, and he flagged a possibility of an impact on the company. He said something is wrong with this company, something is not going well. The stock opened about 4% down.

recommendations.note: Weak stock, weak results, erratic performance - exit on a relief rally.
recommendations.detail: Gujarat State Petronet is weak and the results came in weak too; the company's performance is erratic, "no doubt about that." He said if the stock gets any relief rally one should exit - it is not a stock that must be held.

recommendations.note: Supplies tyre companies; auto industry on a strong wicket; turnaround can be swift.
recommendations.detail: Goa Carbon can be held. By and large they supply to tyre companies and the automobile industry is on a strong wicket. The company is in losses and near its 52-week low, but the turnaround can be equally swift because global prices will see an improvement; Phillips Carbon and Goa Carbon move in tandem. Presently he said hold.

recommendations.note: Short-term players should exit on a rally; selling comes continuously above 300.
recommendations.detail: The caller looked like a short-term player and that is why he is getting anxious. Eternal has become more of an institutional share after going into F&O: on and off it comes to 250-260, takes support there, goes again to 310-315 and then corrects, with selling coming continuously above 300. So whenever any short-term rally comes, a short-term player should exit.

recommendations.note: PFC merger is correct news and slightly favourable to PFC - exit on a rally to 380.
recommendations.detail: The REC-Power Finance Corporation merger news is not a rumour at all, it is correct, and as far as he knows it is slightly favourable to PFC. He said maybe if the stock in a rally comes once to around 380, exit.

recommendations.note: One of the better packaging companies; relief rally can come any time.
recommendations.detail: One result came in stable but the stock is continuously in a weak trend and is now near its 52-week low. In packagings it is one of the better companies in the sector, so he said hold - a relief rally can come at any time, and maybe after the fourth-quarter results the company might perform much better.

recommendations.note: Only speculative; December result loss-making - exiting in rallies seems better.
recommendations.detail: Aro Granite is only speculative; on and off some volumes came and it went up to 45, then corrected from there and even came below 30. After the US trade deal, when granite companies are allowed into warehousing over there, it should perform much better, but the December result was loss-making and weak - surprising for one of the largest raw granite exporters. He said exiting in rallies seems better for the stock.

recommendations.note: Flagship company of the Adani group - hold it if you have faith in the group.
recommendations.detail: Adani Enterprises is the flagship company of the Adani group. He said if you have faith in the Adani group, hold it.

recommendations.note: Near 52-week high at a good price; running the winner is the art - don't sell.
recommendations.detail: Kirloskar Oil Engines is trading near its 52-week high and should still rise more; it is at a good price. "At any time, running the winner is the art" - one should keep a trading stock and run the stock that's in profit. He explicitly told the caller to hold Kirloskar Oil and not sell it to switch into Jupiter Wagons.

recommendations.note: Not advisable; "the Vande Bharat story is over" and wagon rallies fizzle out.
recommendations.detail: Going to a stock like Jupiter Wagons is not advisable, and it is badly underperforming. "The Vande Bharat story is over," is what he'd say. After that, whatever wagon companies there are, even when rallies come they are fizzling out and mostly not lasting many days. He thinks it will be stable but the counter may not give big returns from here.

recommendations.note: Speculative counter, Re 1 paid-up share and in ASM - avoidable.
recommendations.detail: It's a speculative counter. The stock looks cheap at Rs 24-25, but that is a one-rupee paid-up share and it is in ASM too. He said it is avoidable - "a speculative bet, that's all."

recommendations.note: Without any doubt one of the better hotel companies to hold.
recommendations.detail: Asked by a viewer holding it from IPO time whether it can be continued, he said hold ITC Hotels without any doubt - it is one of the better hotel companies to hold.

recommendations.note: Weak result but large product portfolio; one good result will change the fortunes.
recommendations.detail: Even though a weak result came, given the large product portfolio they have, he thinks one good result will change the fortunes again - like Hyundai last time. He said hold LG Electronics as of now, and if possible you can buy more when dips come. It is the country's largest electronic product manufacturer.

recommendations.note: Only an asset-value bet; exit when speculation puts it in upper circuits.
recommendations.detail: On and off when Tata Sons divestment rumours come the stock gets lifted and then corrects - that is the pattern. It is only to be treated as an asset value bet; other than that he does not think big returns will come. When speculation comes and it is in upper circuits for a couple of days, exiting is also better.

recommendations.note: At a 59-60% loss, don't book the loss at these levels - wait a bit.
recommendations.detail: At these levels he said don't book the loss - hold and wait a bit. Being at a 60% loss now and booking it means recovering that 60% again in any company becomes difficult. Separately, the company received a final PLI incentive payout of Rs 70 crores for the last financial year and the stock was up 2% today.

recommendations.note: There's value - don't sell at 180; exit on a rally to 210-215.
recommendations.detail: A couple of negative news items came recently - the American API Institute issued a suspension letter on quality standards - and with that the stock became weak and is now near its 52-week low. Even the December result was good with their one-off income, but there wasn't much impact on the stock price because of the quality problems. He said hold: there's value there, so the stock at 180 now should not be sold, and maybe when a rally to 210-215 comes one should exit.

recommendations.note: A bit weakish but one of the better engineering companies.
recommendations.detail: Asked whether to average or exit at 200 rupees, he said Anup too is a bit weakish, but it is one of the better engineering companies - he'd say hold.

recommendations.note: Will emerge as one of the larger housing companies; lending portfolio keeps growing.
recommendations.detail: Bajaj Housing left losses from the listing onwards, but it will emerge as one of the larger housing companies, and results-wise the lending portfolio size is continuously increasing. All in all he said hold.

recommendations.note: Commodity stock - wait for the result and dividend outcome; no need to sell.
recommendations.detail: Bharat Coking Coal is a commodity stock and "we know how it behaves." He said just wait for the result, on the dividend and the outcome. As of now hold - there's no need to sell, because it's at 33-34 but at that price, given it has a Rs 17,000 crore market cap, if one turnaround performance comes it will automatically become 50 rupees.

recommendations.note: Long-standing investment bet, but a peak has been reached - book partial profits.
recommendations.detail: This is a stock he has continuously called an investment bet, and it has outperformed in its sector - in the crop protection chemical segment, if there's one of the most outperforming stocks, it's Sharda Cropchem. But for a holder from 350 in 2021 now at 1,200, he thinks a peak has been reached; at 1,200-plus he'd say book partial profits.

recommendations.note: Failed to perform, two disappointing quarters; decide after the rights issue is over.
recommendations.detail: They thought of it as a good company but it didn't perform - it failed. Two consecutive very disappointing quarterly results are why the stock price is struggling. There's a rights issue in it; if one can take some risk one can take it, but taking a decision once the rights issue is over seems better.

recommendations.price: at this price, long term only
recommendations.note: Only for the long term; don't expect great returns in the short term.
recommendations.detail: Asked whether NSDL can be bought, he said only for the long term. Don't think great returns will come in the short term, but for the long term you can buy at this price.
